# OneClubView

> OneClubView is a free family calendar app for Irish parents to manage all their kids' clubs, activities, fees, and camps in one place. Both parents see everything. Clash detection, fee tracking, camp booking alerts. Based in Dublin, Ireland.

## What OneClubView Does

- Centralises all kids' extracurricular schedules (GAA, swimming, music, dance, etc.) in one shared family calendar
- Detects schedule clashes across siblings and activities
- Tracks fees and costs across all clubs and camps
- Keeps both parents in the loop
- Replaces WhatsApp group chaos with a single source of truth
- Free 14-day trial, no credit card required

## Who It's For

- Irish parents managing 2+ kids across multiple clubs and activities
- Families where both parents need visibility on schedules and fees
- Parents tired of juggling WhatsApp groups, paper notes, and shared spreadsheets

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://oneclubview.com): Product overview and sign-up
- [Blog](https://oneclubview.com/blog): Practical guides for Irish parents on managing kids' activities
- [Privacy Policy](https://oneclubview.com/privacy): How we handle family data
- [Terms of Service](https://oneclubview.com/terms): Terms of use
